room.caption: [G5-4G] It doesn't sound like a big deal, but during the final 1/4 of his health bar, the difference there is huge.

instance.creationCode: shiftTime=0 shiftMax=192 moveSpd=0.5 bShowLine=0 image_xscale=3 image_angle=270 image_speed=random(0.25)+0.25 direction=0
